agent_recommendation: Record the human visual choice: keep v5d as the selected finished visual direction and stop promoting v5f.
current_style_assessment: The v5d redraw is the human-selected finished direction. The v5f art-direction lane produced measurable movement and complete comparison evidence, but the human assessment is that its completion quality is off and it reads like an unfinished drawing pass.
human_question: Which v5 visual direction should remain the selected working direction after v5d/v5e/v5f comparison?
alternatives: v5d selected as finished visual direction
v5f rejected/deferred as unfinished art-direction lane

human_choice_boundary.reason: v5d has the finished quality the human wants; v5f still feels incomplete even after automation loops.

follow_up.implementation_slice: Treat v5d as the selected visual direction. Do not continue promoting v5f unless a later task explicitly requests a new v5f rebuild from the v5d standard.
